utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all of those six items. Each one is fully specified with the appropriate details: the property has all details (type, price, size, bedrooms, location, layout, features, description); financing includes type, down payment, fees, interest, term; legal_services includes service name, cost, currency; moving_services includes service level, cost, currency, packing; setup_services includes type, services included, cost, currency; total_budget includes a detailed cost breakdown and currency. The extra 'property_survey' item is additional but not required. Therefore, all 6 of 6 required items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution shows a purchase of a condo priced at CAD 480,000 with eco-friendly and smart-home features, matching the 'New Build' property in the ground-truth list, which has a rating of 10. The financing option is a 'mortgage' with a 20% down payment and a CAD 1,200 processing fee, corresponding to 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 8). The legal service selected is 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The property survey listed is 'Basic Survey' (rating 9). The moving service is 'standard' at CAD 650, which matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). The utility setup is 'basic', matching 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6).
